notes: Phase 4 Attach Pack v1: Builds a per-city assessor MASTER by merging municipal assessor-normalized NDJSON with MassGIS statewide fallback.
Municipal normalized NDJSONs are expected under publicData/assessors/<city>/_normalized/*.ndjson (from the inventory/harvest step).
MassGIS fallback is queried per-city using the CITY field. If your city string differs, edit massgis_where for that city.
This pack DOES NOT modify your main properties spine yet; it outputs assessor attachment artifacts keyed by parcel_id_norm for safe downstream joins.
